name: @exovia/neurocanvas-chatgpt-app
description: Exovia ProofLayer for ChatGPT: evidence, portable context, inspectable EXO packs, multi-perspective assurance, privacy, human control and NeuroCanvas handoff.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/reliability.mjs && node --check src/map-builder.mjs && node --check src/exo-pack.mjs && node --check src/assurance-council.mjs && node --check web/widget.js && node --check scripts/judge-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-judge-output.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-submission.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run validate:submission && npm test
